leadText: Sandgem Town (Japanese: マサゴタウン Masago Town) is a town in the Sinnoh region. The town notably has sandy terrain to the south, the beginnings of Sandgem Beach. The beach, part of Route 219, is in close proximity to the town itself. Professor Rowan's laboratory is located here. It is also the hometown of Dawn or Lucas, depending on the player's gender. The little sister of Dawn or Lucas gives information about mass outbreaks she sees on television. It is the first location in Sinnoh where Poké Balls are able to be purchased. The town smells of the salty scent of the sea.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The town's English name was first revealed via dialog in Home is Where the Start Is! . This is the first town that contains a Lab that wasn't in a player's hometown. In-universe, Sandgem Town appears to be named after the Sandgem Flats . Given the location of Lake Verity , Sandgem Town seems to have been settled off to the east of the Sandgem Flats rather than on it. In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , if the player chose Turtwig , Dawn 's rematch team after the player has entered the Hall of Fame 10 times consists of fully evolved members of her animated series counterpart 's team, with the exception of Pachirisu being replaced with Bellossom . Origin [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Pokémon world in relation to the real world → Sinnoh Sandgem Town may correspond to Tomakomai , a port city in the Iburi Subprefecture and the fourth largest city in Hokkaido . Notably, the Japanese rowan is one of the city's symbols, potentially alluded with Sandgem Town being home to Professor Rowan 's Pokémon Research Lab.
